Bug / Task Description: Adding an id to a tag's posting list can insert a duplicate of an id that is already present. The binary search used to locate the insertion point lands just past an equal id rather than on it, so the subsequent already-present check misses the existing entry and inserts a second copy, leaving the sorted posting list with duplicates. Fix the search so an id already in the posting list is detected and not inserted again, keeping each posting list sorted and duplicate-free.
Commit Subject: fix(tagindex): binary search must find existing id to dedupe inserts
